creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 194626
disable net-snmp autodetection


There's an issue when building PowerDNS Recursor if net-mgmt/net-snmp is installed. Upstreams suggests disabling net-snmp support altogether for now.
See: https://github.com/PowerDNS/pdns/issues/6446#issuecomment-379173013

The supplied patch does just that.

No need for a PORTREVISION bump.
